nodeDescription.name: n8n-nodes-preview-sendzen.sendZen
nodeDescription.subtitle: ={{ $parameter.operation === "sendSessionMessage" ? "Send Session Message" : $parameter.operation === "sendTemplateMessage" ? "Send Template Message" : $parameter.operation === "markAsRead" ? "Mark as Read" : $parameter.operation === "showTyping" ? "Show Typing Indicator" : "SendZen" }}

properties.name: operation

options.hint: Use this option to reply to a user within an active conversation without using a template.
options.name: Send Session Message
options.description: Send a free-form message within an active 24-hour WhatsApp conversation window

options.hint: Use this option when replying outside the 24-hour session window or when a template is required by WhatsApp.
options.name: Send Template Message
options.description: Send a pre-approved WhatsApp template message to a recipient

options.hint: Use this option to mark the incoming message as read.
options.name: Mark as Read
options.description: Mark the incoming message as read.

options.hint: Use this option to show a typing indicator while the workflow continues.
options.name: Show Typing Indicator
options.description: Display a typing indicator while the workflow continues.

properties.description: Choose how you want to interact with the recipient using SendZen.
